decisions.title: SSO Consolidation: Microsoft Entra ID vs Google Workspace
decisions.context: Multiple SSO initiatives in flight (ENG-9786, 9787, 10573). Need to decide on primary identity provider to reduce complexity and improve security posture before broader rollout.

arguments.for: Entra ID offers better Azure integration, ABAC capabilities align with ENG-9761, consolidated vendor stack
arguments.against: Google Workspace already deployed, migration risk, team familiarity with existing system

decisions.title: Explore V2 Alignment Architecture Pattern
decisions.context: Multiple alignment point features converging (ENG-10563, 7789, 6231). Need unified approach to avoid technical debt as Canvas and Explore V2 converge on comparison workflows.

arguments.for: Single pattern ensures consistency, reduces code duplication, accelerates feature velocity for 'Nail the Core' pillar
arguments.against: Different panel types have unique requirements, premature abstraction risk

decisions.title: Edge Production Readiness Gate
decisions.context: ENG-10530 stress testing in progress. Need clear go/no-go criteria for Edge general availability given 'Build the Moat' strategic importance and customer commitments.

arguments.for: Early release captures market opportunity, validates moat hypothesis with real usage data
arguments.against: Premature release risks reputation, support burden could distract from core product improvements

decisions.title: Ask SIFT Agent Markdown Capabilities Scope
decisions.context: ENG-10324 and 10520 enable richer agent interactions. Need to define which markdown features align with 'Decisions Captured' north star vs feature bloat.

arguments.for: Rich formatting increases decision clarity, competitive parity with modern AI tools
arguments.against: Complexity in parsing/rendering, potential security concerns, may distract from core insights

decisions.title: Data Layer V3 Migration Timeline
decisions.context: ENG-10539 shadow testing revealed discrepancies. Need decision on full cutover vs extended dual-run period given impact on 'Embed Deeper' pillar performance promises.

arguments.for: Fast cutover reduces operational complexity, forces issue resolution, unblocks performance improvements
arguments.against: Data integrity risk, customer trust impact if errors reach production, support escalation burden

timeAudit.weekSummary: High coordination load across alignment features, SSO migration, and Edge readiness - 32 hours in meetings reflects cross-team dependencies but risks execution velocity
alerts: Only 8 focus hours this week - 'Nail the Core' execution at risk

Edge stress testing results needed by Thursday to unblock Friday decision
Data Layer V3 discrepancy analysis consuming unplanned engineering hours
